info.title: Planday API
info.description: Planday workforce management API covering absence, HR, pay, payroll, portal, reports, revenue, and scheduling.

get.summary: GET Return salary allocation for a given employee id
get.description:
Returns salary allocation for a given employee id. Date can be defined optionally.
**Required scope**: salaries read.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Return records from given date (inclusive). Use "yyyy-MM-dd" format.

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

get.summary: GET Return salary allocation history for a given employee id
get.description:
Returns salary allocation for a given employee id. Date range can be defined optionally.
**Required scope**: salaries read.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Return records from given date (inclusive). Use "yyyy-MM-dd" format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Return records till given date (inclusive). Use "yyyy-MM-dd" format.

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

put.summary: PUT Disable salary allocation for a given employee id
put.description:
Disable salary allocation for a given employee. When 'No allocation' is set, the employee's salary cost is excluded from the total salary cost calculation.
**Required scope**: salaries update.
Requires authorization.

requestBody.description: Input object to specify additional parameters.

schema.description: Employee salary allocation no allocation input model
Employee salary allocation no allocation input model
Employee salary allocation no allocation input model
Employee salary allocation no allocation input model

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

put.summary: PUT Set salary allocation for a given employee id to Monthly Salary
put.description:
Set salary allocation for a given employee to Monthly Salary. The expected hourly cost is based on the monthly salary divided by the number of scheduled hours in the given month. The total costs in the schedule will therefore never vary from the monthly salary. Ex. If an employee is scheduled for 10 hours, the hourly cost will be $4150 / 10 hours = $415.
**Required scope**: salaries update.
Requires authorization.

requestBody.description: Input object to specify additional parameters.

schema.description: Employee salary allocation monthly salary input model
Employee salary allocation monthly salary input model
Employee salary allocation monthly salary input model
Employee salary allocation monthly salary input model

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

put.summary: PUT Set salary allocation for a given employee id to Scheduled Hours
put.description:
Set salary allocation for a given employee to Scheduled Hours. The cost shown in the schedule is determined by the monthly salary divided by the contracted hours to calculate the expected hourly cost, which is multiplied by the number of hours the employee is scheduled for. The total cost can therefore differ from the monthly salary, depending on how many hours the employee is scheduled for. Ex.Expected hourly cost is $4150 / 150 hours = $27.67. If the employee is scheduled for 200 hours, the total scheduled cost will be 200 hours x $27 = $5400.
**Required scope**: salaries update.
Requires authorization.

requestBody.description: Input object to specify additional parameters.

schema.description: Employee salary allocation scheduled hours input
Employee salary allocation scheduled hours input
Employee salary allocation scheduled hours input
Employee salary allocation scheduled hours input

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

put.summary: PUT Set salary allocation for a given employee id to Business Days
put.description:
Set salary allocation for a given employee to Business Days. The costs in the schedule are determined by the monthly salary divided by the number of selected business days in the given month. The total cost for a salaried employee will always be the same as the monthly salary. The expected daily cost can vary each month, depending on the total days in the month which determines how many selected business days the month has. Ex. $4150 / 23 business days = $180.43.
**Required scope**: salaries update.
Requires authorization.

requestBody.description: Input object to specify additional parameters.

schema.description: Employee salary allocation business days input model
Employee salary allocation business days input model
Employee salary allocation business days input model
Employee salary allocation business days input model

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

Returns pay rates for an employee in a specified employee group. Date can be defined optionally. **Please note**: due to the security reasons, this endpoint can be used only to retrieve pay rates data of regular employees. Obtaining pay rates of administrators is currently not supported.
**Required scope**: payrates read.
Requires authorization.

get.description: Returns the payroll data matching given criteria including: departments, time period and shift status.

parameters.name: departmentIds
parameters.description: Return data only for specified departments. DepartmentIds must be provided as a comma separated list

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Return data from given date (inclusive). Use yyyy-mm-dd format

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Return data till given date (inclusive). Use yyyy-mm-dd format

parameters.name: shiftStatus
parameters.description: Return data only for specified type of shifts. Possible values: Approved, Nonapproved

parameters.name: returnFullSalaryForMonthlyPaid
parameters.description:
If set to true, than full monthly salary will be returned for monthly paid employees.
            If set to false or not provided, then only the salary for provided time period will be returned for those employees.

get.description: Returns basic portal information such as country, time zone, aliases, company name. Also returns child portals connected to this portal, if available.

get.description:
Get a list of employee groups.
**Required scope**: employeegroup read.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Return no more than "limit" records. Maximum of 50 records per request

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

get.description:
Get details of an employee group.
**Required scope**: employeegroup read.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Employee group id, must be a non-negative value

404.description: Employee group with given id doesn't exist

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

put.description:
Update details of an employee group.
**Required scope**: employeegroup update.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Employee group id, must be a non-negative value

400.description: Employee group id or employee group name is invalid

404.description: Employee group with given id doesn't exist

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

delete.description:
Delete an employee group. Use this endpoint with caution.
**Required scope**: employeegroup delete.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Employee group id, must be a non-negative value

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

get.description:
Gets a collection of employee ids in this employee group
**Required scope**: employee read.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Employee group id, must be a non-negative value

400.description: Employee group id or employee group name is invalid

404.description: Employee group with given id doesn't exist

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

get.summary: GET Employee change history by employee ID
get.description:
Get history of changes of an employee account.
**Required scope**: employee history.
Requires authorization.

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: Only records with creation date equal or greater than "startDateTime" wil be returned. Use yyyy-mm-dd format

parameters.name: endDateTime
parameters.description: Only records with creation date equal or lower than "endDateTime" will be returned. Use yyyy-mm-dd format

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Return no more than "limit" records. Maximum of 50 records per request

404.description: Employee change history for given ID doesn't exist

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

get.description:
Get a list of available employee types.
**Required scope**: employeetype read.
Requires authorization.

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

get.description:
Get a list of skills on the portal which can be used for scheduled shifts or assigned to employees.
**Required scope**: EmployeeReadSkillRead.
Requires authorization.

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

post.description:
Create a new skill on the portal.
**Required scope**: skill create.
Requires authorization.

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

put.description:
Update the name, description and time limited status of a skill by providing the skill id and the new values.
**Required scope**: skill update.
Requires authorization.

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

delete.description:
Delete a skill by providing the skill id.
**Required scope**: skill delete.
Requires authorization.

403.description: Your application isn't assigned to the appropriate scope, so it can't perform this action.

start.description: Date and time of beginning of the break

end.description: Date and time of end of the break

duration.description: Duration of the break in hours

amount.description: Actual monetary value of the break (Duration * Modification)

isPaid.description: Flag indicating weather the break is paid or not

salary.description: Total calculated salary on the shift

start.description: Beginning date and time of the shift

end.description: End date and time of the shift

employeeId.description: Identifier of the employee associated with the shift

shiftTypeId.description: Identity number of the shift type

employeeGroupId.description: Employee group's identifier associated with the shift

positionId.description: Identifier of the Position specified on the shift

salaryCode.description: Salary code associated with the shift

wage.description: Wage object defining the rate and the wage type

shiftDuration.description: Duration of the shift as a text

shiftsPayroll.description: Payroll information related to shifts, containing shift related supplements and breaks information - please see detailed model in the response

supplementsPayroll.description: Time ranged supplement information (not related to shifts) - please see detailed model in the response

salariedPayroll.description: Personal and security supplements of employees - please see detailed model in the response

currencySymbol.description: Currency symbol of the payroll report

currencyFormatString.description: Currency format of the payroll report

salaryCode.description: Salary code of the salaried payroll record (e.g. : unit(160 hours) * wage = salary monthly)

wage.description: Unit value of the payroll record

salary.description: Total salary on the payroll record

end.description: End time of the salaried range

units.description: Number of occurrences of the supplement

start.description: Start time of the salaried range

name.description: Supplement name associated with a shift

companyName.description: Company name associated with the portal

timeZone.description: Default time zone of the portal

maxDepartments.description: Maximum number of departments in the portal. No limit when null.

aliases.description: List of alias names associated with the portal

portals.description: Child portals associated with this portal (if available)

aliases.description: List of alias names associated with the portal

isPaid.description: Whether the break is paid or not. Null if break source is punch clock.

shiftStatus.description: Shift status filter. Possible values: "NotApproved", "Approved", "Both", or null (treated as "Both").

shiftId.description: Shift ID. This is null for a punch clock entry not yet associated with a Shift.

atWorkStart.description: How the Shift looked at the time of punch-in.

workedTime.description: How the Shift looked at the time of punch-out.

firstApproved.description: How the Shift looked at the time when it was approved the first time.

approved.description: How the Shift looks right now in approved state.

current.description: How the Shift looks right now.

lastModifiedByEmployeeId.description: Shift last modified by Employee ID.

ShiftWorkTime.description: Shift work time. This shows how the Shift looked like at a point in time.

id.description: The unique identifier of the budget entry. If null, a new budget entry will be created.

departmentId.description: The ID of the department associated with the budget. If null, the budget is not linked to a specific department.

startDate.description: The date for which the budget applies.

salaryPercentage.description: The percentage of salary costs allocated in the budget.

description.description: An optional description providing additional details about the budget entry.

revenue.description: The expected revenue associated with this budget entry. If null, revenue is not specified.

salaryBudget.description: Optional salary budget allocated for the day.

CreateUpdateDailyBudgetInput.description: Represents the input data required to create or update a daily budget entry.

dayScheduleId.description: Day schedule identifier of the revenue record

revenueUnitId.description: Revenue unit identifier of the revenue record

departmentId.description: Department identifier of the revenue record

turnover.description: Turnover value of the revenue record

registrationNumber.description: Registration number of the bank account (only used in a few countries)

tags.name: PayRates
tags.description:
### Overview


**Methods Supported** | `GET`, `PUT`
--- | ---
**Description** | Controller for pay rates
**Scopes used** | `payrates:read`, `payrates:update`


 ### Model Type 

 | Field name | Description | 
 |---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **employeeId** | Unique identifier of employee | 
| **employeeGroupId** | Unique identifier of employee group | 
| **salaryCode** | Salary code | 
| **wageType** | Wage type of pay rate. Can be either: HourlyRate = 1 or ShiftRate = 2. | 
| **rate** | Pay rate value | 
| **validTo** | Date by which pay rate should be valid |

tags.name: Allocations
tags.description:
### Overview


**Methods Supported** | `GET`, `PUT`
--- | ---
**Description** | Get or set salary allocations.
**Scopes used** | `salaries:read`, `salaries:update`


 ### Model Type 

 | Field name | Description | 
 |---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **repeatingDayOfMonth** | Day of month in which repeating will happen | 
| **repetitionMode** | Salary allocation repetition mode. Can be either PortalStandard = 1 or PeriodSalary = 2. | 
| **departmentDistributions** | List of weekly salary allocation distributions between departments | 
| **employeeId** | Unique identifier of employee | 
| **validFrom** | Date from which salary allocation should be valid | 
| **validTo** | Date by which salary allocation should be valid | 
| **costAllocation** | Salary cost allocation mode. Can be either NoAllocation = 0, MonthlySalary = 1, ScheduledHours = 2 or BusinessDays = 3. | 
| **createdByEmployeeId** | Unique identifier of employee who created this salary allocation | 
| **createdAt** | Creation date and time of this salary allocation |

tags.name: DefaultPayRates
tags.description:
### Overview


**Methods Supported** | `GET`, `PUT`
--- | ---
**Description** | Controller for default pay rates
**Scopes used** | `employeegroup:read`, `employeegroup:update`


 ### Model Type 

 | Field name | Description | 
 |---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **employeeGroupId** | Unique identifier of employee group | 
| **defaultWageType** | Default Wage Type | 
| **hourlyRate** | Hourly rate value. It applies only when DefaultWageType is set to HourlyRate. | 
| **shiftRate** | Shift rate value. It applies only when DefaultWageType is set to ShiftRate. | 
| **salaryCode** | Salary code | 
| **salaryCode2** | Salary code 2 |

tags.name: EmployeeSalaries
tags.description:
### Overview


**Methods Supported** | `GET`, `PUT`
--- | ---
**Description** | Controller for employee salaries
**Scopes used** | `salaries:read`, `salaries:update`


 ### Model Type 

 | Field name | Description | 
 |---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **employeeId** | Unique identifier of employee | 
| **salary** | Salary decimal value | 
| **salaryCode** | Salary code | 
| **hours** | Number of hours worked in the given time range | 
| **validFrom** | Date from which salary is valid | 
| **validTo** | Date by which salary is valid | 
| **createdByEmployeeId** | Unique identifier of employee who created this salary allocation | 
| **createdAt** | Creation date and time of this salary allocation in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss format | 
| **salaryTypeId** | Salary Type Id |

tags.name: Salaries
tags.description:
### Overview


**Methods Supported** | `GET`
--- | ---
**Description** | Controller for employee salaries
**Scopes used** | `salaries:read`

tags.name: SalaryIdentifiers
tags.description:
### Overview


**Methods Supported** | `GET`, `PUT`
--- | ---
**Description** | Salary identifiers. Requires a Pro subscription to be used.
**Scopes used** | `UseDepartmentSalaryIdentifiers`, `salaries:read`, `salaries:update`


 ### Model Type 

 | Field name | Description | 
 |---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **employeeId** | Unique identifier of the employee | 
| **salaryIdentifier** | The salary identifier for the employee | 
| **departmentSalaryIdentifiers** | The salary identifiers for the departments the employee is associated with |

tags.name: Employee
tags.description:
### Overview


**Methods Supported** | `GET`, `PUT`, `POST`
--- | ---
**Description** | Operations that can be performed on employees.
**Scopes used** | `employee:read`, `employee:update`, `employee:create`


 ### Model Type 

 | Field name | Description | 
 |---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **hiredDate** | Date when the employee got hired | 
| **id** | Employee identifier | 
| **dateTimeCreated** | Date and time of employee creation | 
| **dateTimeModified** | Date and time of the last employee data modification | 
| **dateTimeDeleted** | Datetime when the employee account was last deactivated | 
| **employeeTypeId** | Identifier of the employee's employee type | 
| **salaryIdentifier** | Salary code identifier of the employee | 
| **firstName** | First name of the employee | 
| **lastName** | Last name of the employee | 
| **userName** | Username of the employee - must be an e-mail | 
| **cellPhone** | Cell phone number associated with the employee | 
| **street1** | Address 1 information of the employee's address | 
| **street2** | Address 2 information of the employee's address | 
| **zip** | Zip code of the employee's address | 
| **city** | City of the employee's address | 
| **phone** | Phone number associated with the employee (not frequently used) | 
| **email** | Primary email address of the employee | 
| **departments** | List of Departments associated with the employee, specified as a list of Department IDs | 
| **employeeGroups** | List of Employee Groups associated with the employee, specified as a list of Employee Groups IDs | 
| **bankAccount** | Bank account associated with the employee | 
| **birthDate** | Birth date of the employee | 
| **ssn** | Social security number of the employee | 
| **cellPhoneCountryPrefix** | Country prefix of the cell phone number | 
| **cellPhoneCountryCode** | Country code of the cell phone number. Follows ISO 3155. alpha-2 codes. | 
| **phoneCountryPrefix** | Country prefix of the phone number | 
| **phoneCountryCode** | Country code of the phone number. Follows ISO 3155. alpha-2 codes. |
